name: Rep. Anthony Gonzalez
tweet: I came to Congress on a promise to make our government work for the people again, and a big part of that is bringing this governing body into the 21st Century. On my second day in Congress, it’s already clear that the modernization of Congress is long overdue.

name: Rep. Anthony Gonzalez
tweet: I look forward to supporting those efforts.

name: Rep. Anthony Gonzalez
tweet: The bill we voted on yesterday was neither a compromise nor a realistic solution to funding our government. Leadership from both parties need to come together and work in a meaningful bipartisan manner to fund the government and put our country back on track.

name: Rep. Anthony Gonzalez
tweet: We have a responsibility to the men and women of this country to come together in a bipartisan manner to solve our big challenges. That starts with funding the government in a way that responsibly secures our border.
